offer: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, delayed fraud detection causes financial losses. We provide fraud flagging instead of manual review of claims data.
problem: Identifying potential fraud in insurance claims
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance adjusters
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
DM outreach to insurance adjusters with demo video
Engage in community forums for insurance tools
try_it: Let users try claim data monitoring on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
